_comment: System default scheduler tasks. Personal tasks go in ~/.memory/config/scheduler_config.json — entries there are merged on top of these by id.

default_tasks.description: Daily runtime config validation — enable in ~/.memory/config/scheduler_config.json

config.goal: Run the MoJoAssistant configuration doctor to validate system health. Use bash_exec to run: python3 -c "from app.config.doctor import ConfigDoctor; import json; r = ConfigDoctor().run_all_checks(); errors = [c for c in r.checks if c.status == 'error']; warns = [c for c in r.checks if c.status == 'warn']; print(f'ERRORS: {len(errors)}, WARNS: {len(warns)}'); [print(f'  ERROR [{c.category}/{c.id}] {c.message}') for c in errors]; [print(f'  WARN  [{c.category}/{c.id}] {c.message}') for c in warns]" Then save the output as your FINAL_ANSWER.
